items.title: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The US says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs", while Iran warns it will "take decisive measures" in response.

items.title: Marine Le Pen to run for French presidency and appeal conviction in top court
items.summary: The hard-right National Rally leader has ended months of speculation, after a court ruled she could run but would have to wear a tag for a year.

items.title: Trump looms large as Nato grapples with challenge of rearming Europe
items.summary: The US president's inflammatory words have punctuated the image of unity at this crucial gathering, Security Correspondent Frank Gardner writes.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 烏無人機奔襲2700公里狂轟！消息人士：俄最大煉油廠已停產
items.summary: 2名業界消息人士8日證實，俄羅斯最大煉油廠鄂木斯克（Omsk）煉油廠，在被烏克蘭無人機攻擊後已停止運作。  路透報導，烏克蘭無人機7日攻擊，重創了位於西伯利亞的鄂木斯克煉油廠...…
